DELETE t
FROM dbo.hcFormFunders t
INNER JOIN dbo.hcForm hf ON t.hcFormid = hf.id
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON hf.accountInfoId = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
/**WHERE 
    (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
        OR (
            sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
            AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
            AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
            AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
        )
    );
    **/

DELETE t
FROM dbo.hcFormResponse t
INNER JOIN dbo.hcForm hf ON t.hcFormid = hf.id
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON hf.accountInfoId = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
WHERE 
    (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
        OR (
            sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
            AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
            AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
            AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
        )
    );

DELETE t
FROM dbo.hcFormResponse t
INNER JOIN dbo.ChildProfile cp ON t.childProfileId = cp.id
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON cp.accountInfoId = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId;

DELETE t
FROM dbo.hcFormResponseBehaviorTrackingExcluded t
INNER JOIN dbo.hcFormResponse fr ON t.hcFormResponseId = fr.id
INNER JOIN dbo.hcForm f ON fr.hcFormid = f.id
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON f.accountInfoId = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
/**WHERE 
    (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
        OR (
            sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
            AND a.ID NOT IN (23382) -- Exclude whitelisted account
            AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
            AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
        )
    );
**/

    );

DELETE t
FROM dbo.hcGlobalLockStaffException t 
JOIN dbo.hcStaffMember s ON s.id = t.StaffMemberId 
JOIN dbo.tblMember m ON m.ID = s.tblMemberId 
JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON m.accountInfoID = a.ID
JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
/**WHERE
    (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
        OR (
            sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
            AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
            AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
            AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
        )
    );
**/

DELETE t
FROM dbo.hcNote t
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT t.Id
    FROM dbo.hcNote t
    INNER JOIN ChildProfile cp ON cp.id = t.clientid
    INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON cp.accountInfoId = a.ID
    INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
    INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
    /**WHERE 
        sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
        OR (
            sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
            AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
            AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
            AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
        )**/

    UNION

    SELECT t.Id
    FROM dbo.hcNote t
    INNER JOIN hcStaffMember s ON s.id = t.staffId
    INNER JOIN dbo.tblMember tm ON tm.id = s.tblMemberId
    INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON tm.accountInfoId = a.ID
    INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
    INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
    /***WHERE 
        sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
        OR (
            sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
            AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
            AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
            AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
        )***/
) toDelete ON t.Id = toDelete.Id;

DELETE t
FROM dbo.hcNoteType t
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON t.companyAccountId = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
/**WHERE
    (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
        OR (
            sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
            AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
            AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
            AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
        )
    );
**/

DELETE t
FROM dbo.hcPayOver t
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON t.accountInfoId = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
WHERE 
    (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
        OR (
            sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
            AND a.ID NOT IN (23382) -- Exclude test account
            AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
            AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
        )
    );

DELETE t
FROM hcPermissionsAccessLevels t
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM hcRolePermissions p
    JOIN dbo.AccountRole r ON r.id = p.roleId
    JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON r.accountInfoId = a.ID
    JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
    JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
    WHERE 
        p.hcPermissionsAccessLevelId = t.id
        AND (
            sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
            OR (
                sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
                AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
                AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
                AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
            )
        )
);

DELETE t
FROM dbo.hcPerson t
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM dbo.hcChildProfileContacts tm
    INNER JOIN dbo.ChildProfile cp ON tm.ChildProfileid = cp.id
    INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON cp.accountInfoId = a.ID
    INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
    INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
    WHERE 
        tm.personid = t.id
        AND (
            sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
            OR (
                sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
                AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
                AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
                AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
            )
        )
);

DELETE t
FROM dbo.hcPlaceOfService t
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON t.accountInfoId = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId

    sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
    OR (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
        AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
        AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
        AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())

***/
